scripts.build: astro build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/server/wrangler.json'; if(fs.existsSync(p)){ const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p)); delete d.assets; delete d.kv_namespaces; delete d.images; delete d.previews; d.pages_build_output_dir='dist'; d.main='dist/server/entry.mjs'; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(d)); fs.writeFileSync('wrangler.json', JSON.stringify(d)); }"
